reviews.review_description:
Since Larcenauts been put offline even while having decent bots this game sure to go next. 

Since owning this game I never got into a match. I paid money for virtual dust.

Gamers need to stand up and tell developers to quit letting games die by not having any type of offline support
Not only is this game bad they won't even let you refund everyone make sure to flag this trash
Check the names of the top reviews, all jumbled letters and fake reviews. The game also sucks. Reporting to meta for fake reviews and scammy practices

developer_response.body: Thank you for playing Strike Rush. We apologize for any unsatisfactory aspects of the game, and we plan to improve the game through continuous updates. thank you.

reviews.review_description: This is one of the most fun strategy games on VR. It is great to play solo if you are an overthinker...also great fun with friends. Time flies while you are engrossed in this game. The hangout is a cool spot and painting those sculptures are so therapeutic.

developer_response.body: Thank you for playing Strike Rush! Conquest battles are fun when played with friends, and the recently updated Quick Battle can be played in a free-for-all style! Even if you play alone, play in this mode and have more fun! :)

reviews.review_description:
The character designs are great. Looking forward to seeing new Blitzers in future updates!
 Easy to find a game, a great community, and oh yah, the game is super fun to play. Highly recommend

developer_response.body: Thank you for playing Strike Rush. We put a lot of effort into character design to ensure user satisfaction. Blitzer & Blitzmon pairs with even cooler designs will be updated in the future, so please look forward to it! :)

reviews.review_description: I've been playing this game for hours and I still can't put it down! My life is officially over.

developer_response.body: Thank you for playing Strike Rush! It looks like you have started a new life at Strike Rush :) We ask for your continued love!

reviews.review_description: Thanks for the recent performance improvements. The game runs so much smoother now!

developer_response.body: Thank you for playing Strike Rush :) We have continuously updated patches to ensure smooth play for our users. We will continue to make updates to ensure your satisfaction in the future :)

reviews.review_description: Super fun and casual game for shooting.

developer_response.body: Thank you for playing Strike Rush! We're glad you enjoyed the game! Let’s meet at the Arena and play together in the future! :)

reviews.review_description: I play on a quest 3 and I can’t load into ANY match whatsoever so i wasted $20 it will matchmake then we will sit at a screen so long that i just leave its no reason it should be taking that long. ridiculous price for basically a loading simulator. there are better games out there, look them up and buy them because you DO NOT get to actually get in a game on this “game”

developer_response.body:
Thank you for sharing your feedback. We're sorry to hear about your experience with our game.

As a very new game, we are actively working on improving the engagement and matchmaking experience for all players. We understand the frustration of long wait times and are committed to resolving these issues.

To help enhance your experience, we organize matches on our Discord server, where more and more players are joining every day. This growing community should provide you with more matching opportunities in the very near future. In addition, we are extending our engagement team too, to provide more frequent matches. 

Your feedback is valuable to us, and we appreciate your patience as we work to create a smoother and more enjoyable gameplay experience.

reviews.review_description:
first match - over 1 minute of queue and got an error while on selection. When driving the robot, there is a delay between the movement of the head and the robot view so it makes me motion sick.

Any paid multiplayer game on the quest is dead. There are not enough players even for free to play games.

developer_response.body: Thank you for playing Strike Rush. We understand your concerns regarding paid multiplayer games, and we will continue to do our best to ensure that users experience matching without any inconvenience. thank you :)

reviews.review_description: I am an experienced FPS and TeamFight genre player and I have to say, this game is quite good, probably one of the best currently available. It combines different aspects that combine into a wonderful experience many may find enjoyable.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your positive review! We're thrilled to hear that as an experienced FPS and TeamFight genre player, you find our game to be one of the best available. We strive to create a unique and enjoyable experience by combining various aspects of gameplay, and it's great to know that our efforts resonate with players like you. Happy gaming!

reviews.review_description: A fast-paced shooter game. It's a little hectic, but there's never a dull moment. We look forward to more updates in the future.

developer_response.body: Strike Rush! Thank you for playing. We are planning more updates in the future, so please look forward to it!

reviews.review_description: A great game for friends who are new with using VR's

developer_response.body: Thank you for playing Strike Rush. I would like to tell you that our game is easy to play even for beginners, but the more you play, the more you can enjoy a deeper play with Blitzmon and skills :) We hope you have fun playing!

reviews.review_description:
easy to understand play rule(4 on 4 capture zone)
but it's unique in that each player can fight together with a robot pet.
not sure yet.. there seem to be several types of pets. 
also nice to be able to ride a large robot(like 'titan fall') during the match.
including character skills, there are many things to play with.

developer_response.body: Thank you for playing Strike Rush! Strike Rush is easy to access at first, and the more you play, the more you can play it depending on how you use skills with Blitzmon and Colossus. We hope you have fun playing! See you on the battlefield :)

reviews.review_description: The overall game is good and user-friendly. I just hope there are more characters, and I'm sure they will be adding them in the future.

developer_response.body: Thank you for playing Strike Rush :) In the future, new Blitzer, new Blitzmon stages, and new skins will be added sequentially to Strike Rush. Patches and updates are scheduled, so please look forward to them!!

reviews.review_title: It's more fun and casual than I thought.
reviews.review_description: It's also tense to play the game when the 4 to 4 match is made, and there is a strategy to recover with items everywhere or reinforce firepower. However, it was a little difficult to control COLOSSUS.

developer_response.body: Thank you for playing Strike Rush! Thank you for your satisfactory play :) However, we are working hard to apply various improvements to Colossus as well. Please look forward to better Strike Rush in the future!

reviews.review_description:
Playing this game has been a true rollercoaster of excitement. Especially, the tactical play involving hiding and shooting is not only highly effective but also incredibly fun, adding a strategic depth to the fast-paced gameplay.

Honestly, it's surprising that despite my name is titanium, I've been taken down numerous times due to the barrage of enemies fire. Nonetheless, the thrill of accurately hitting an enemy's head and racking up kills is exhilarating every time!
The timing of your team's regeneration and hide-and-shoot skill are crucial in this game.

developer_response.body: Thank you for playing Strike Rush! We wanted to emphasize that in order to lead our team to victory, we must be good at concealment and cover using objects and pieces located on the stage. We put a lot of effort into this, and I think we achieved a satisfactory result after much trial and error. We hope you continue to have fun playing Strike Rush! thank you :)

reviews.review_description:
The game was casual, fresh, and very fun.
There has 2 skills for each characters, and the combination of skills are so fun
And also I love dash system. It feel very fresh and fast.
But I hope so there have more users to make smooth matching.

I highly recommend this game!!!!!!!

developer_response.body:
Thank you for playing Strike Rush! You can't forget the pleasure of using two skills at the right time and overpowering your opponent!
More update elements will be added in the future, so please look forward to it! thank you!

reviews.review_description: This game is very optimized for enjoying VR FPS. And by matching users, you can continue to improve your skills, and you can enjoy mini-games alone, so time goes by in an instant.

developer_response.body: Thank you for playing Strike Rush! You may lose track of time while playing, but we will do our best to make it a game worth your time! thank you!

reviews.review_title: Good. It's the best to enjoy it lightly
reviews.review_description:
I've been playing Overwatch a lot, so I got used to it quickly. I like the colossal robot called Colossus. It collapsed faster than I thought, but I think it was a new experience.
I think I'll play it more often in the future. I hope I can promote it a lot and get a lot of people to match it.

developer_response.body: Thank you for playing Strike Rush! You know the joy of playing Colossus, right? We think Colossus is a very exciting system to play! I hope you have fun playing in the future :)
